codebook_metadata.title: Merged Codebook for the 12 Fundamental Existential Prerequisites (12FEP)
codebook_metadata.author: Based exclusively on the works of Alfried Längle

citations.Längle, 2002: Längle, A. (2002). Existential fundamental motivation. In Motivation, Consciousness and Self-Regulation (pp. 27–42). Nova Science Pub Inc. [Also cited as Längle, 2002b]
citations.Längle, 2011: Längle, A. (2011). The Existential Fundamental Motivations Structuring the Motivational Process. In D. A. Leontiev (Ed.), Motivation, Consciousness and Self-Regulation (pp. 27–42). Nova Science Publishers, Inc.

codebook_metadata.copyright: ©2026 Aestra Inc. except when external source noted.

instructions_for_llm.overview: Score participant testimony on the 12 Fundamental Existential Prerequisites (12FEP) on a scale of 0 (absent) to 5 (fully present).
general_coding_principles: All scoring must be based exclusively on Längle's theoretical framework, utilizing the provided quotes and concepts.
Justification must explicitly identify evidence of the **'emotionally free (decided) stand'** or **'Inner Consent'** (Längle, 2002) and the fulfillment of the prerequisite's **'active part'**.

Each score must be justified with: (1) **Direct quote from participant testimony**, (2) **Specific Längle criterion with citation**, and (3) Analysis of relevant **coping reactions** or **phenomenological outcomes**.

scoring_rubric_justification.0_Absent: Failure to meet the prerequisite; relies on basic coping reactions/deficits. **'Fails systematically'** to respond personally (Längle, 2002).
scoring_rubric_justification.1_Minimal_Presence: Barely present; **fleeting** or **fragile** signs; coping reactions **dominate**. Not yet **'in the outer dialogue'** (Längle, 2002).
scoring_rubric_justification.2_Weak_Presence: Limited and **inconsistent** evidence. Clear coping reactions are present; struggle with **'Inner Consent'**.
scoring_rubric_justification.3_Moderate_Presence: Active in the **'continuous dialogue (preoccupation)'**. Partial **'inner agreement'** and attempts to **'mobilize decisiveness'** (Längle, 2011). Shows the required **'active part'** (e.g., 'to accept and to endure').
scoring_rubric_justification.4_Strong_Presence: Consistent experience and **appropriation** with minor gaps. Largely achieved an **'emotionally free (decided) stand'** (Längle, 2002).
scoring_rubric_justification.5_Fully_Present: Unbroken **'Inner Consent'**; **stable experience** and corresponding **active stance**. The **'deepest and freest emotions correspond'** to intentions, reflecting a **'fulfilled existence'** (Längle, 2011).

fundamental_motivations.existential_question: **I am – can I be?** Can I claim my place in this world under the conditions and with the possibilities I have? (Längle, 2002)
fundamental_motivations.positive_outcome: The sum of these experiences of trust is the **fundamental trust** (Längle, 2002).

prerequisites.definition: Do I enjoy protection, acceptance, do I **feel at home** somewhere? (Längle, 2002)
prerequisites.active_participation_required: My active part is to **'accept'**... to **rely on the support** and to **trust the protection**; in short **'to be there'** and **not to flee** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: Trust in the world and **confidence in myself** (Längle, 2011)
Active ability to accept the positive sides and to endure the negative ones (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.definition: Do I have **enough space** for being there? (Längle, 2002)
prerequisites.active_participation_required: To accept means to be **ready to occupy the space** (Längle, 2002). Man procures himself the space he needs with his ability to **endure and to accept conditions** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: Ability to **'let each other be, because there is still enough space for me'** (Längle, 2002)
indicators_of_absence: Activism: **overactivity** like fighting bacteria by **compulsive washing** (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.definition: Where do I find **support** in my life? (Längle, 2002)
prerequisites.active_participation_required: The **force to let be** whatever is difficult, menacing or unalterable and to **'tolerate'** what cannot be changed (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: **Rely on the support** (Längle, 2002)
Accepting that these conditions are **reliable, solid and steady** (Längle, 2002)

fundamental_motivations.existential_question: **I am alive – do I like this fact?** Is it good to be there? (Längle, 2002)
fundamental_motivations.positive_outcome: These experiences form the **fundamental value**, the most profound feeling for the value of life (Längle, 2002).

prerequisites.definition: Do I have **relationships**, in which I feel closeness... and in which I experience **community**? (Längle, 2002)
prerequisites.active_participation_required: **'I seize life, engage in it, when I turn to other people'**... or pull it towards me (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: **Go towards it** (Längle, 2002)
**Being in harmony with the world and with myself** (Längle, 2002)
indicators_of_absence: **Negligence in one's life style** that makes life stale (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.definition: **What do I take time for?**... To take time for something means to give away a part of one’s life (Längle, 2002).
prerequisites.active_participation_required: **'Do I take time for valuable things, worthy to spend my time for?'** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: **Conscious, meaningful time allocation** to relationships/activities of worth.
indicators_of_absence: Wasting time or empty time usage.
prerequisites.note_on_scoring: Focus on the **value** of what time is spent on, not just the amount of time.

prerequisites.active_participation_required: **My consent to being touched is necessary** (Längle, 2002). The **willingness to let myself be touched** by what is valuable in the situation (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: This **'to turn to'** will **'make life vibrate within me'** (Längle, 2002)
Ability to **admit the closeness** of someone else (Längle, 2002)
indicators_of_absence: Aggression: **fury, rage**... to **'agitate the other person'** to obtain the relationship (Längle, 2002)
Freezing: **Resignation** reaction of **feigned death paralyzed half-way** (Längle, 2002)

fundamental_motivations.existential_question: **I am myself – may I be like this?** Do I feel free to be like that? (Längle, 2002)
fundamental_motivations.positive_outcome: I will find myself, find my authenticity, my relief and my **self-esteem** (Längle, 2002).

prerequisites.definition: Do I feel **seen** in my uniqueness? (Längle, 2002)
prerequisites.active_participation_required: **'Say 'yes to myself''** (Längle, 2002). **Encounter** which makes me find my **'own 'I' in the 'you''** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: Ability to **encounter** (Längle, 2002)
The ability to **stand by my own self** at its core (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.definition: Do people do me **justice**? For what can I take **responsibility**? (Längle, 2002)
prerequisites.active_participation_required: to **'delimitate myself'** and to **'stand by my own'**, but to **'refuse whatever does not correspond to myself'** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: **Regret** as one of the two means by which we can live our **authenticity** (Längle, 2002)
Setting **boundaries congruently**.
indicators_of_absence: Activism: **stubborn insistence** and **leading a functional life** (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.definition: For what am I **appreciated** – for what can I appreciate myself? (Längle, 2002)
prerequisites.active_participation_required: Thus I create for myself the **appreciation** requisite for **feeling entitled to be what I am** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: **Authenticity** and **self-respect** (Längle, 2002)
The ability to **stand by their uniqueness** (Längle, 2002)
indicators_of_absence: Freezing type: **dissociation of the bodily integrity, dividing and splitting of emotion and cognition** (Längle, 2002)
Pathological outcome: **histrionic symptoms and/or personality disorders** arise (Längle, 2002).

fundamental_motivations.existential_question: **I am there – for what is it good?** (Längle, 2002)
fundamental_motivations.positive_outcome: **Fulfillment** of my existence in its core (Längle, 2002).

prerequisites.definition: Is there a place where I feel **needed**, where I can be **productive**? (Längle, 2002)
prerequisites.active_participation_required: The **'phenomenological attitude'** is needed, an **'attitude of openness'** (Längle, 2002). The recognition of **'what my life is all about'** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: **Dedication** and **productivity**; **'dealing with the questions put before me in each situation'** (Längle, 2002)
indicators_of_absence: Basic reaction: **'planless, day-to-day attitude toward life'** (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.definition: Do I see and experience myself in a **larger context** that provides structure and **orientation**? (Längle, 2002)
prerequisites.active_participation_required: My active part is to **'bring myself into agreement with the situation'**, to examine whether what I am doing is really a **good thing**... for my environment (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: **Integration** into something greater (Längle, 2002)
Orientation expressed (e.g., 'I am working at a cathedral') (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.fep_id: 4.3_Value to be realized in the future
prerequisites.fep_name: Value to be realized in the future
prerequisites.definition: Do I see a **value** to be realized in the **future**? (Längle, 2002)
prerequisites.active_participation_required: Deciding for **'the most valuable, realistic possibility'**... for which I feel I **'should decide myself'** (Längle, 2002). Living out of **Self-transcendence** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: Names a specific **to-be-realized value** (Längle, 2002)
indicators_of_absence: Basic reaction: a **'provisional attitude towards life'** (Längle, 2002)
